ideation: This animation sequence portrays a robot interacting with a desktop computer.  The robot's actions suggest engagement with the screen and the keyboard. The sequence begins with both arms relaxed at the side, transitioning to a posture where the robot's hands are positioned as if typing on a keyboard. Then, the hands move to a position as if the robot is interacting with the computer mouse. Finally, the robot returns to a relaxed posture.  The left arm will be used to manipulate the mouse, while the right arm will do the typing. The lack of elbows will be compensated for by using the shoulder joints to simulate the motion of the arms.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to work
right arm reaches to type, left arm poised
left arm moves to the mouse, right arm continues typing
both arms return to a relaxed, resting position
